textPlain: Nearly had a heart attack until I re-read it. I thought Libera Chat[0] was acquired[0] https://libera.chat/

The part I suspect most are here for:- LibreChat remains 100% open-source under its existing MIT license- Community-first development continues with the same transparency and opennessof course, no binding commitment to any of that in the long term.
I was wondering how it could acquire something that was formed as a reaction against freenode getting acquired...
